steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The skill is Words in Context. The colon after the blank signals that the rest of the sentence explains it: Juarez’s "many significant accomplishments" over a long tenure are listed as evidence. The blank must mean consequential or notable — the opposite of ordinary.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "unpredictable": means behaving in ways that cannot be anticipated — the text says nothing about Juarez’s consistency or predictability; this attribute is absent from the passage. ✗
  • "important": means marked by significant work or consequence — directly supported by "many significant accomplishments," his historic status as the first Indigenous president, and his long, consequential tenure. ✓
  • "secretive": means tending to keep things hidden — the text focuses on publicly known achievements and milestones; nothing suggests concealment. ✗
  • "ordinary": means common or typical — directly contradicts the passage’s emphasis on his historic firsts and "many significant accomplishments." ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
